title: Nursery Rhyme. CIX. Proverbs.
content:
The fair maid who, the first of May,
        Goes to the fields at break of day,
        And washes in dew from the hawthorn tree
        Will ever after handsome be.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CIX. Proverbs."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
